data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional security layer to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Implements time-based OTP and backup PIN for account access.

data.title: Suspicious Login Alerts
data.description: Automated alerts for suspicious login attempts to users.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms to identify anomalous login patterns.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures only the communicating users have access to the message content.
data.technical_spec: Signal Protocol Encryption employing a double-ratchet algorithm.

data.title: Spam Detection and Filtering
data.description: Automated systems to identify and block spam messages.
data.technical_spec: Behavioral analysis with heuristic methods for spam identification.

data.title: Application Hardening
data.description: Techniques used to protect the application from reverse engineering and exploit attempts.
data.technical_spec: Obfuscation, stack protection, and integrity checks.
